premiumEnabledDescription: Advanced dashboard widgets are available for this account.
premiumDisabledDescription: Feature flags backend is unavailable or premium access is not granted.

helpDiagnostics.pageSubtitle: Search help knowledge base, run diagnostics checks, and generate a redacted support bundle without losing workflow context.
helpDiagnostics.errorFallbackMessage: You were redirected from a route error. Start diagnostics below to investigate.
helpDiagnostics.noMatchDescription: No help articles match current query. Reset filters or open diagnostics checks.
helpDiagnostics.diagnosticsDescription: Checks: auth/session, network, provider connectivity, feature flags, browser/webgl readiness.
helpDiagnostics.bundleReadyMessage: Redacted support bundle is ready to attach to support ticket.

articles.authSessionRecoverySummary: What to check when session expired and 401/403 access errors.
articles.networkTimeoutDiagnosticsSummary: Diagnosing network timeouts and API unavailability issues.
articles.providerOutagePlaybookSummary: Checking LLM/Git provider degradation and fallback strategies.
articles.scanFailureTriageSummary: How to investigate scan/review worker failures and restart jobs.
articles.webglReadinessSummary: Checking browser and WebGL readiness for CodeCity screens.

diagnosticDetails.providerLoading: Provider status is still loading. Re-run diagnostics in a moment.
diagnosticDetails.providerNone: No connected provider detected. Check provider configuration.
diagnosticDetails.featureFlagsDefaults: Feature flags unavailable; defaults may be applied.
diagnosticDetails.sessionTokenPresent: Session token is present in local storage.
diagnosticDetails.sessionTokenMissing: No session token found. Re-authentication may be required.
diagnosticDetails.networkReachable: Network looks reachable from browser context.
diagnosticDetails.webglUnavailable: WebGL context unavailable, fallback renderer recommended.

actions.sessionRecoveryDescription: Re-authenticate and restore draft/session state before retrying.
actions.networkRecoveryDescription: Check connectivity and external source settings for failed requests.
actions.providerRecoveryDescription: Switch provider fallback and inspect degradation timeline.
actions.webglRecoveryDescription: Use safe fallback renderer or validate browser WebGL support.
actions.healthyDescription: No blocking issues detected. Continue your workflow.

scanProgress.pageSubtitle: Track the lifecycle of scan "{{jobId}}" in real time.
scanProgress.batchOnboarding: Batch onboarding: {{count}} repositories are tracked in this run.

scanErrorRecovery.pageSubtitle: Recover failed repository scans using safe retry steps and diagnostics links.
scanErrorRecovery.recoveryFlowMessage: Follow the steps below to restore scan progress without losing onboarding context.
scanErrorRecovery.step1: Open repositories and confirm provider connectivity and webhook status.
scanErrorRecovery.step2: Retry scan for the affected repository from the onboarding queue.
scanErrorRecovery.step3: Open jobs and check worker logs if retry fails again.

sessionRecovery.pageSubtitle: Restore authentication and continue from saved workflow state after session expiry.
sessionRecovery.guidanceMessage: Re-authenticate first, then return to your active review, issue, or onboarding context.
sessionRecovery.step1: Open organization settings and verify active session and tenant context.
sessionRecovery.step2: Re-login if token is expired or tenant was switched by policy.
sessionRecovery.step3: Return to diagnostics and confirm auth check status is healthy.
